messages.content: modify：In the IEYC unit Little Movers Make Giant Strides, Baobao demonstrated a keen interest in physical activities and actively participated in various games such as hula hoops and sandbags. During the Family Fun Day, he also enjoyed himself with his family, fully embodying the spirit of a young athlete. He persisted until the end of the event, and we are genuinely proud of Baobao!

In the IEYC unit "Little Movers Make Giant Strides," Baobao showed a strong enthusiasm for physical activities and engaged wholeheartedly in games like hula hoops and sandbags. During the Family Fun Day, he had a wonderful time alongside his family, truly exemplifying the spirit of a young athlete. He remained determined and participated until the very end of the event, and we couldn’t be prouder of Baobao!

Baobao demonstrates great concentration in his football class, readily embracing every challenge, whether it's warming up with kicks, mastering ball control, or scoring goals. He finds immense joy in each activity, and whenever he successfully completes a move, he breaks into a radiant smile, exuding an innocence and charm that makes everyone cheer for him.

Baobao exhibits impressive concentration during his football class, eagerly accepting every challenge, from warming up with kicks to honing his ball control and scoring goals. He takes great pleasure in each activity, and his radiant smile lights up the room whenever he successfully completes a move. His genuine enthusiasm and charm inspire everyone around him to cheer him on!

Although Baobao is just over a year old, he really enjoys playing with his elder friends. Look, in the photo, he is standing in the role-playing area, putting a firefighter's hat on his older brother, creating a heartwarming scene! His elder siblings dote on this cute little brother and are always happy to share their toys with him, enjoying the fun of playing together.

Though Baobao is just over a year old, he delights in playing alongside his older friends. In the photo, you can see him in the role-playing area, adorably placing a firefighter's hat on his older brother, creating a truly heartwarming moment! His older siblings cherish this cute little brother and are always eager to share their toys with him, relishing the joy of playing together.
润色100字：Baobao对音乐很感兴趣，每次音乐响起，他总是会不由自主地舞动起来，就像一个小精灵，可爱极了！在冬季庆典上，他参加了第一次的面对全校家长的表演活动，全程淡定自信，大家都为他喝彩欢呼！
Baobao对音乐充满热情，每当旋律响起，他总是情不自禁地随着音乐舞动，宛如一只可爱的小精灵！在冬季庆典上，他首次参加了面对全校家长的表演活动，始终展现出淡定与自信，赢得了全场观众的喝彩与欢呼！他的表现让大家感到惊喜，无疑是那天最闪亮的星！
翻译

Baobao has a profound interest in music. Whenever a melody plays, he can't help but dance along, like an adorable little sprite! During the winter celebration, he participated in his first performance in front of all the parents at the school. He maintained a calm and confident demeanor throughout, earning cheers and applause from everyone! His performance truly amazed the audience, making him the brightest star of the day!
润色100字：Lila是十一月份才加入我们的新成员，还不到两岁，但是表现出很强的独立性，可以自己穿脱鞋子，独自进餐，十分让人骄傲！
Lila是我们十一月份的新成员，虽然还不到两岁，但她展现出了令人惊讶的独立性，能够自己穿脱鞋子和独立用餐，实在令人感到骄傲！她的自信和独立令人刮目相看，展示了她在这个年纪里取得的可贵成长。我们期待她在未来的每一步都能继续闪耀！
翻译

Lila joined us in November as a new member. Although she is just under two years old, she demonstrates impressive independence by putting on and taking off her shoes and eating on her own, which makes us incredibly proud! Her confidence and autonomy are remarkable, showcasing the valuable growth she has achieved at such a young age. We look forward to seeing her continue to shine in every step ahead!
润色100字：Lila 在IEYC单元 Little Movers Make Giant Strides中充分表露她活泼好动的特质，她积极快乐地投入到每一次挑战中，享受过程是她的最大乐趣！不管是呼啦圈，沙包游戏，她都玩得很尽兴。在家庭欢乐日中，她和家人共同完成了所有的活动，对于小小年纪的她真的非常厉害了！
在IEYC单元《Little Movers Make Giant Strides》中，Lila充分展现了自己活泼好动的特质。她积极、快乐地投入每一次挑战，享受整个过程是她最大的乐趣！无论是呼啦圈还是沙包游戏，她都玩得非常尽兴。在家庭欢乐日中，她和家人一起出色地完成了所有活动，真是令人赞叹的小小年纪就展现出如此出色的表现！
翻译：在IEYC单元《Little Movers Make Giant Strides》中，Lila充分展现了自己活泼好动的特质。她积极、快乐地投入每一次挑战，享受整个过程是她最大的乐趣！无论是呼啦圈还是沙包游戏，她都玩得非常尽兴。在家庭欢乐日中，她和家人一起出色地完成了所有活动，小小年纪就展现出如此出色的表现真是令人赞叹！

In the IEYC unit "Little Movers Make Giant Strides," Lila fully showcases her lively and active nature. She enthusiastically and joyfully embraces each challenge, finding the greatest joy in the process! Whether it's hula hoops or sandbag games, she engages in them with great enthusiasm. During Family Fun Day, she and her family successfully completed all the activities together. It is truly impressive to see such outstanding performance at such a young age!
润色100字：Lila在足球课上表现积极，无论是踢球预热、控球技巧，还是射门得分，她都开心接受每一次挑战，并从中找到无穷乐趣。
Lila在足球课上表现得非常积极，无论是踢球热身、控球技巧，还是射门得分，她都十分乐于接受每一个挑战，并从中体验到无尽的乐趣。她的笑容不断展现出对足球的热爱，让课堂充满了快乐的氛围！
Lila在足球课上表现得非常积极，无论是踢球热身、控球技巧，还是射门得分，她都十分乐于接受每一个挑战，并从中体验到无尽的乐趣。足球活动中的她笑容不断，让课堂充满了快乐的氛围！翻译

Lila demonstrates great enthusiasm in her football class. Whether it's warming up with kicks, practicing ball control, or scoring goals, she eagerly embraces every challenge and finds endless joy in the process. Her bright smile during football activities fills the classroom with a joyful atmosphere!
润色100字：Lila 对有趣的实验充满了好奇心。她饶有兴趣地观看了火山爆发实验，并迫不及待地自己用小苏打和醋尝试了起来，展现出了年轻科学家般的探索精神。
Lila对有趣的实验充满了好奇心。她津津有味地观看了火山爆发实验，随后迫不及待地尝试用小苏打和醋进行实验，展现出如年轻科学家般的探索精神。她的积极参与和无限热情让这个实验充满了乐趣与惊喜！
翻译

Lila is filled with curiosity for interesting experiments. She watched the volcanic eruption experiment with great interest and eagerly tried it herself using baking soda and vinegar, showcasing the exploratory spirit of a young scientist. Her enthusiastic participation and boundless excitement made the experiment a fun and surprising experience!
100字润色：Lila是一名热情可爱的小女孩，她很喜欢集体生活，和小朋友们玩得很开心！她特别喜欢Cobi哥哥，不管是在操场上还是室内活动，她都会和Cobi互动游戏，特别友爱！
Lila是一位热情可爱的小女孩，她非常享受集体生活，和小朋友们玩得格外开心！她特别喜欢Cobi哥哥，无论是在操场上还是在室内活动中，她总是主动与Cobi互动游戏，展现出极大的友爱和亲和力。她的快乐感染着周围的每一个人，让大家都沉浸在欢乐的氛围中！
翻译

Lila is a cheerful and lovable little girl who truly enjoys communal life and has a wonderful time playing with her friends! She has a special affection for her brother Cobi, engaging in interactive games with him both on the playground and during indoor activities, demonstrating great friendship and warmth. Her joy is contagious, bringing happiness to everyone around her and creating a fun-filled atmosphere!
润色100字：Lila虽然不到两岁，但是展现出了非常突出的语言天赋，她能用母语表达自己的需要和感受，与人交流能用较完整的句子。对英文的学习也是很自然，会自如地模仿单词句子，如water bottle, eyes on you等，很让人惊叹！希望她能继续保持对语言的敏感度，每天进步
尽管Lila还不到两岁，但她展现出了杰出的语言天赋。她能用母语流利地表达自己的需求和感受，与他人交流时能够使用完整的句子。在学习英语方面，她同样表现得很自然，自如地模仿单词和短语，比如“water bottle”和“eyes on you”，令人惊叹！希望她能够继续保持对语言的敏感度，天天进步！
尽管Lila还不到两岁，但她展现出了突出的语言天赋。她能用母语流利地表达自己的需求和感受，与他人交流时能够使用完整的句子。在学习英语方面，她同样表现得很自然，自如地模仿单词和短语，比如“water bottle”和“eyes on you”，令人惊叹！我们相信她能够继续保持对语言的敏感度，天天进步！翻译

Although Lila is just under two years old, she demonstrates outstanding linguistic talent. She can express her needs and feelings fluently in her mother tongue and uses complete sentences when communicating with others. In learning English, she also shows natural ability, easily mimicking words and phrases like "water bottle" and "eyes on you," which is truly impressive! We believe she will continue to maintain her sensitivity to language and make progress every day!
mimicking：another word
Another word for "mimicking" could be "imitating."
100字润色：冬季庆典上，Lila穿着可爱的服装上台表演，面对众多观众，她表现出淡定；台下的她更是各种搞怪，戴著小眼镜在玩游戏，开心等待上台表演，特别可爱。
在冬季庆典上，Lila身穿可爱的服装自信登台表演，面对众多观众，她展现出淡定优雅的风采。而在台下，她则表现得活泼可爱，戴着小眼镜，兴致勃勃地玩游戏，开心地等待上台演出，真是惹人喜爱！她的表现让整个庆典充满了欢声笑语。
翻译在冬季庆典上，Lila身穿可爱的服装自信登台表演，面对众多观众，她展现出淡定的风采。而在台下，她则表现得活泼可爱，戴着玩具小眼镜，兴致勃勃地玩游戏，开心地等待上台演出，真是惹人喜爱！她的表现让整个庆典充满了欢声笑语。

During the winter celebration, Lila confidently took the stage in her adorable costume, showcasing her composure in front of a large audience. Offstage, she was lively and charming, wearing toy glasses and eagerly playing games as she happily awaited her turn to perform. She was truly delightful! Her presence filled the entire celebration with laughter and joy.
another：composure
Another word for "composure" could be "calmness" or "poise."
